allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; print(''Bug tracker import successful'')")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.config import load_config; cfg = load_config(); print(''Config loaded for env:'', cfg[''runtime''][''env''])")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; bt = get_bug_tracker(); print(''Bug tracker tests passed'')")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker; bt = get_bug_tracker(); bugs = bt.get_bugs_by_criteria({''status'': ''open''}); print(f''Open bugs: {len(bugs)}''); [print(f''- {bug[""bug_id""]}: {bug[""title""]}'') for bug in bugs]")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from app.common.build_validator import get_build_validator; bv = get_build_validator(); info = bv.get_build_info(''dev''); print(f''Current dev build: {info[""build_id""]}'')")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. python -c "
from app.common.bug_tracker import get_bug_tracker
import time

bt = get_bug_tracker()

# Critical Finding #2: Admin endpoints without authentication
bug_data_2 = {
    ''timestamp'': time.strftime(''%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'', time.gmtime()),
    ''environment'': ''dev'',
    ''build_id'': ''7233f9c'',
    ''severity'': ''critical'',
    ''category'': ''security'',
    ''status'': ''open'',
    ''title'': ''Admin endpoints without authentication'',
    ''description'': ''Destructive admin operations (/api/database/cleanup, /api/database/cleanup-collection, /api/database/delete-chunk) are open to any caller with CORS * access. High risk of destructive misuse outside PROD.'',
    ''source'': ''ai_review'',
    ''files'': [''app/server.py:3255-3370'', ''app/server.py:3464-3524''],
    ''requirements'': [''SEC-001'', ''SEC-002'', ''ADM-002'']
}
bug_id_2 = bt.create_bug(bug_data_2)
print(f''Created critical bug {bug_id_2}: Admin auth'')

# High Finding #1: Single-threaded server blocking
bug_data_1 = {
    ''timestamp'': time.strftime(''%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'', time.gmtime()),
    ''environment'': ''dev'', 
    ''build_id'': ''7233f9c'',
    ''severity'': ''high'',
    ''category'': ''performance'',
    ''status'': ''open'',
    ''title'': ''Single-threaded server with blocking ingestion'',
    ''description'': ''HTTPServer is not multi-threaded; long-running ingestion blocks handling of other requests. Uploads and RAG queries will queue behind ingestion.'',
    ''source'': ''ai_review'',
    ''files'': [''app/server.py:3536-3538'', ''app/server.py:1821-1853''], 
    ''requirements'': [''PERF-003'', ''ING-003'']
}
bug_id_1 = bt.create_bug(bug_data_1)
print(f''Created high bug {bug_id_1}: Threading'')

# High Finding #6: User-specified collection names
bug_data_6 = {
    ''timestamp'': time.strftime(''%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'', time.gmtime()),
    ''environment'': ''dev'',
    ''build_id'': ''7233f9c'', 
    ''severity'': ''high'',
    ''category'': ''security'',
    ''status'': ''open'',
    ''title'': ''User-specified collection names for destructive ops'',
    ''description'': ''Allowing arbitrary collection names increases blast radius - typos can wipe unintended collections.'',
    ''source'': ''ai_review'',
    ''files'': [''app/server.py:3477-3506'', ''app/server.py:3310-3336''],
    ''requirements'': [''SEC-001'', ''ADM-002'']
}
bug_id_6 = bt.create_bug(bug_data_6)
print(f''Created high bug {bug_id_6}: Collection validation'')
")
